title: cynoglossum circinnatum
intro: Cynoglossum circinnatum, also known as the Chinese forget-me-not or Chinese gromwell, is a perennial herb native to China, characterized by its blue flowers and thick, fleshy leaves. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cynoglossum circinnatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory infections. Cynoglossum circinnatum is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or dried herb for use in teas, tinctures, and capsules, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal preparations.
